issues.description: Residual same-class Phaser tween leak: destroy() destroys graphics/indicator but never kills the floating indicator tween created in showIndicator() with targets: this.indicator and repeat: -1 at src/features/space/game/internal/objects/interactive-object.ts:96. ObjectManager can call obj.destroy() directly while an object is nearby, e.g. src/features/space/game/internal/objects/object-manager.ts:64, so hideIndicator() at src/features/space/game/internal/objects/interactive-object.ts:106 is not guaranteed to run.
issues.recommendation: In InteractiveObject.destroy(), call this.scene.tweens.killTweensOf(this.indicator) before this.indicator.destroy(); keep the existing glowTween cleanup for graphics.
